note: Automation risk bands: Low < 0.30, Medium 0.30–0.60, High 0.60–0.85, Very High > 0.85. aiExposure = observed_exposure from Anthropic Economic Index (Claude AI-usage based, not Frey-Osborne 2013). O*NET skills are best-effort: successfully loaded
